title: FM Kit → DS Kit component mapping
description: Schema for fm-to-ds-map/fm-to-ds-map.json — declares how each Fat Marker (FM) wireframe component maps to a Design System (DS) component during hi-fi conversion. The `dsKey` field is Figma-canonical (immutable component_set key, synced from Figma) and marked readOnly; everything else is hand-maintained alignment metadata. The optional `_regen` block records provenance (D4 from R6).

_schema_version.description: Substrate schema version. Pinned at 1; bump only on a schema-incompatible change to the file shape.

_regen.description: Optional provenance block describing how this file is regenerated. See $defs.regenBlock.

examples.instructions: Mixed source: dsKey synced from Figma, dsSlug hand-maintained.

_meta.description: Free-form metadata block carrying authoring context (description, registry pointers, lastUpdated, _authoringNote). Intentionally loosely typed — consolidation into `_regen.instructions` is deferred to a follow-up (D6 in R6).

examples.description: FM → DS mapping for hifi conversion

mappings.description: Map of FM component key → DS-mapping descriptor. Keys are FM component identifiers (e.g. `fmButton`, `fmCheckbox`). Each value carries the DS slug, the immutable DS Figma key, and the variant/property translation tables consumed by hifi conversion.

unmappable.description: Map of FM component key → free-form prose explaining why the component has no direct DS equivalent and what to do instead during hifi conversion. Entries here are guidance only — they do not carry dsKey/dsSlug.

examples.fmStickyNote: FM-only annotation tool — remove during hifi conversion.

regenBlock.description: Structured provenance block describing how this file is regenerated (or that it is hand-curated). Shared across Class C JSONs in this substrate.

source.description: Where the canonical content of this file comes from. `manual` = hand-curated; `figma` = synced from a Figma node; `ai-assisted` = LLM-generated with human review.

lastSync.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the most recent sync from `source`. Set by sync tooling for `figma`/`ai-assisted` sources; omit for `manual`.

instructions.description: Free-form prose telling a human author or AI assistant how to update this file responsibly. Surfaced by the Knowledge Editor's 'Regenerate with AI' seam.
examples: dsKey is Figma-canonical (synced from sync-from-figma); dsSlug is hand-maintained.

nodeId.description: Figma node id (with a colon separator), when source = `figma`.

dsSlug.description: Hand-maintained slug of the DS component this FM component maps to. Should match an entry in the DS Kit registry.

dsKey.description: Immutable Figma component_set key for the target DS component. Synced from Figma by scripts/sync/sync-from-figma.js — do not hand-edit; the Knowledge Editor surfaces this as read-only.

defaultVariant.description: Default DS variant axis values applied when no intent-specific override fires. Keys are DS variant axis names; values are the chosen variant labels.

variantMap.description: Per-axis translation table from FM variant labels to DS variant labels. Outer keys are FM axis names; inner keys are FM labels; inner values are DS labels.

intentVariants.description: Optional intent → variant-override map. Keys are intent slugs (`destructive-action`, `error-state`, `success-confirmation`, `default`). Values are partial DS variant axis overrides, or null to opt out.

propertyMap.description: Translation table from FM component property names to DS property names. A null value means the FM property is intentionally dropped.

dropVariants.description: FM axis names that have no DS equivalent and are dropped during conversion.

notes.description: Free-form prose explaining quirks of the mapping (e.g. typos in the DS Figma file, axis semantics differences).
examples: FM 'Type' axis maps to DS 'State'. Note DS uses 'Activ' (typo).

_note.description: Inline maintainer note (legacy field used on some entries). Newer entries prefer the unprefixed `notes` field.
